page: Microsoft Azure D32ds_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Ddsv7 server family. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. This instance provides 32 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 16 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. The processor operates at a clock speed of 4.2 GHz and features a large 480 MB L3 cache. It is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

The server includes 1890 GB of local storage and is premium storage capable, though it does not feature any GPU accelerators. The underlying Intel Xeon processor supports advanced instruction sets, including Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX, AVX-512) and Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX), which accelerate vector and matrix operations. Cryptographic tasks are aided by hardware-accelerated AES and SHA extensions.

Benchmark results indicate strong single-core CPU performance, placing in the top 25% for stress-ng, and top-tier single-threaded gzip compression and bzip3 decompression. Multi-core CPU performance and memory bandwidth fall within the average range. Static web serving throughput and LLM inference for smaller models show strong performance. This profile makes the D32ds_v7 highly suitable for general-purpose workloads, relational databases, web serving, and moderate machine learning inference tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure D32ds_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Ddsv7 family, powered by an Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor with 32 dedicated vCPUs and 16 physical cores. Operating at 4.2 GHz with a 480 MB L3 cache, this x86_64 server is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM and 1890 GB of local storage. It supports advanced instruction sets like AVX-512 and AMX for matrix operations, alongside premium storage capabilities. Benchmarks show strong single-core CPU performance, top-tier single-threaded compression, and strong static web serving throughput, while multi-core operations and memory bandwidth remain average. This balanced resource density offers a cost-effective profile for general-purpose workloads, database hosting, web serving, and moderate machine learning inference.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D32ds_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB of RAM, and 1890 GB of local storage, delivering strong single-core and compression performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D32ds_v7 is a general-purpose VM with 32 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 1890 GB local storage for databases and web serving.
tagline: A balanced x86_64 virtual machine featuring dedicated high-frequency Intel Xeon cores, local storage, and advanced matrix extension support.
bullet_points: Powered by a 32-vCPU Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor running at 4.2 GHz
Equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM and 1890 GB of local storage
Supports AVX-512 and AMX instruction sets for accelerated matrix math
Delivers strong single-core CPU and top-tier single-threaded compression performance
Well-suited for general-purpose applications, databases, and web serving
